Article Title: They ran against odds, not the clock
Article Text:
.

Stories that stood out



More than just a race



At the Times Internet Half Marathon 2026, some of the most powerful moments did not come from the fastest finishers, but from those who redefined the meaning of participation. Runners with disabilities took part across categories, bringing with them stories of determination, discipline, and quiet resilience that left a lasting impact on everyone present.Among the participants, Neeraj Kumar, a national level para-athlete, made his debut in the 2K running category, demonstrating how athletes can successfully transition across sporting formats. Ashok Kumar Sharma returned to competitive running by building on his strong college athletic background while independently managing every aspect of his participation, reflecting both discipline and self-reliance.Rakhee Mittal completed the 2K walk with steady endurance, highlighting consistency and a deep-rooted commitment to fitness.The diversity of participation was equally evident across longer race categories such as the 5K and 10K. Visually impaired runner Sanjay Sondhi completed the 5K with the suport of a caregiver, showcasing coordination and trust. Amit Kumar, a below-the-knee amputee, ran using prosthetics, embodying adaptability and determination. Sanchit Goyal, with a hearing impairment, navigated the race through focus and rhythm rather than sound, maintaining a steady pace throughout.In the 10K category, 18-year-old Madhav Madan completed the run alongside a family member, emphasizing not only personal resilience but also the vital role of support systems.Beyond competition, the event evolved into a platform where national-level athletes and everyday participants came together, proving that effort holds far greater value than limitations. At the Times Internet Half Marathon 2026, the finish line symbolized more than completion-it stood as a powerful representation of perseverance, courage, and the will to move forward despite every obstacle.
Article Summary: At the times internet half marathon 2026, some of the most powerful moments did not come from fastest finishers, but from those who redefined the meaning of participation. Runners with disabilities took part across categories, bringing with them stories of determination, discipline, and quiet resilience.

Article Title: Coco Gauff Hair Controversy: Coco Gauff responds to Miu Miu hair criticism in 8 minute video and turns backlash into bold message
Article Text:
Coco Gauff (Image Via Getty)

Coco Gauff explains her Miu Miu look and defends natural hair while addressing criticism and sharing powerful message

Coco Gauff has finally spoken after facing heavy criticism online over her recent Miu Miu campaign. The 20-year-old shared an honest 8-minute video on TikTok, where she addressed the comments about her hair and appearance. What started as a fashion moment quickly turned into a bigger conversation, and Gauff chose to face it directly.The issue began when images from her Miu Miu shoot started spreading online. While many fans praised her look, a section of social media reacted negatively. Most of the criticism was about her natural hairstyle, which she wore in a simple bun. Some comments went too far, making comparisons that many people found inappropriate. After staying silent at first, Gauff returned to X and later posted a detailed response on TikTok.In her video, Coco Gauff kept her tone calm but clear. She explained that the shoot was done in a simple setting, her parents’ backyard, and that she had full control over her outfit choice. She said, “First of all, it’s Miu Miu. That’s their aesthetic. I love the Miu Miu aesthetic. So if you don’t like it, the girls who get it, get it.The girls who don’t, don’t. I picked the outfit out.”Then she spoke about her hair, which became the main topic of criticism. Gauff explained why she chose not to style it in a sleek way. She said, “I personally don’t like to slick back my hair super sleek because it does damage my hair.”She also made it clear that she is proud of her natural look. Talking about her 4C hair, she added, “I’m not going to apologize for the way that my hair looks… There are other girls who have the exact same hair as me.” Her message was simple but strong, representation matters, and no one should feel the need to change themselves to fit others’ expectations.As the video continued, her tone shifted to something more positive and uplifting. Gauff spoke about how people who criticize others are often dealing with their own issues. She encouraged others not to take such comments seriously.She ended with a powerful message, saying, “Black people are beautiful. Black hair texture, kinky afro hair texture is beautiful. You don’t need people on the internet who don’t like themselves, who are insecure about themselves to tell you that.”Away from social media, Gauff is also finding her rhythm again on the court. In 2026, she has already reached the semifinal in Dubai and the final in Miami, where she lost to Aryna Sabalenka. With the clay season coming up, she will now focus on defending her French Open title.
Article Summary: Coco gauff has finally spoken after facing heavy criticism online over her recent miu miu campaign. The 20-year-old shared an honest 8-minute video on tiktok, where she addressed the comments about her hair and appearance. She explained that the shoot was done in a simple setting, her parents’ backyard.

Article Title: Mukul Choudhary: 'My journey started even before I was born': Mukul Choudhary after single-handedly winning IPL game for LSG
Article Text:
Mukul Choudhary (BCCI Photo)

Watch ‘We lost momentum’ – Mahela on MI’s defeat and key mistakes ‘We lost momentum’ – Mahela on MI’s defeat and key mistakes

NEW DELHI: Lucknow Super Giants’ stunning last-ball win over Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026 had a new hero, as young Mukul Choudhary announced himself on the big stage with a fearless match-winning knock.Chasing 182, LSG looked down and out at one stage, but Choudhary’s explosive unbeaten 54 off 27 balls turned the game on its head.Reflecting on his journey after the game, the Player of the Match said, "My journey actually started even before I was born. My father had a dream that one day his son would play cricket. But back then, our financial condition wasn’t strong, so I couldn’t start early."He added, "I began playing at around 12-13 years of age. There weren’t many academies at that time. One academy, SBC Cricket Academy, had just opened, and I trained there for about 5–6 years."Choudhary’s rise hasn’t been easy, moving cities in search of better opportunities. "After that, I moved to Jaipur because if you want to play at a higher level, you have to move forward. I’ve been practicing in Jaipur for the last four years," he said, before explaining how match exposure helped him grow. "I stayed in Gurugram for 3-4 months and played matches in Delhi, which helped me a lot in adapting to faster-paced cricket.Despite the pressure of a tense chase, his mindset remained simple. "There is pressure, sir. But I think that God has given me this opportunity, so I just believe in my ability. This is a chance where you can become something big or make a name for yourself."His approach during the chase was clear: "My plan was simple - I wanted to stay till the end. I trust myself that if I remain not out till the last, I can win the game."Choudhary waited patiently for his moment. "My thinking was that even if the bowler delivers four perfect balls, at least one will come into my zone. I just need one ball to hit a six."And when it came, he didn’t miss. "The first one. I hadn’t hit a six in the previous two matches, so that first six was special for me."Summing up his fearless style, he said, "Since childhood, I’ve always played attacking cricket. I’ve always been someone who hits."In the end, Choudhary remained grounded: "Yes sir… but they serve the country at the borders. I’m just doing my part here."
Article Summary: Lucknow super giants beat kolkata knight riders in ipl 2026. Mukul choudhary scored an unbeaten 54 off 27 balls for lsg. He was named the player of the match in the last-ball win.

Article Title: Dana White escalates Jake Paul rivalry refuting Mike Tyson and Muhammad Ali comparison
Article Text:
Jake Paul and Dana White. Image via: Getty Images

Dana White takes subtle dig at Jake Paul



Jake Paul slams Dana White for UFC downfall



Does Jake Paul belong alongside all-time boxing greats Mike Tyson and Muhammad Ali ? Well, not according to UFC boss, Dana White. Recently, he took a subtle dig at Jake Paul, and this time he did it without even saying his name. The UFC president found a lighter but pointed way to question Paul’s place in boxing’s elite circle. It came during a casual livestream, but the message was hard to miss.The moment quickly gained traction because of where it happened and what it implied, White reacted to images surrounded by boxing greats in a way that brought out his humor. Their rivalry has simmered for years, and it felt like another escalation rather than a one-off comment.The exchange unfolded on Adin Ross’ livestream, where Dana White appeared as a guest while checking out the streamer’s gym. The walls were lined with murals of iconic fighters, including Tyson and Ali. But one face stood out for different reasons. Jake Paul’s inclusion alongside those legends drew a reaction.White did not call him out directly. Instead, he leaned on a familiar reference. “This is like that Sesame Street thing, one of these things doesn’t belong.Which one is it?” he said, laughing.The remark pointed to a gap between Paul’s current standing and the legacy of fighters he was being compared to. Tyson and Ali were not just champions. They shaped eras. Paul, despite building a respectable 12-2 record in a short time, has yet to enter that level of conversation.If White prefers subtlety, Paul does not. The YouTuber turned boxer has been direct in his criticism of the UFC and its leadership. Speaking on Theo Von’s podcast, he questioned both the direction of the promotion and White’s role in it.“Their investors have gotten greedy,” Paul said. “And they’re not, they forgot their heart as a company. That’s the problem. And so, it’s dying…And also, MMA is not… MMA hasn’t stood the test of time because the best people in the sport become wrestlers; they just like to hold on… No, Khabib, Khamzat… This is boring. No one wants to watch that.”He went further, adding, “[He's] not smart enough. Just look at what he's doing.”Paul’s criticism touches on familiar points. Fighter pay, style of fights, and the overall direction of MMA have all been part of his argument. Not everyone agrees. For many within the sport, wrestling-heavy bouts are seen as technical and strategic rather than dull.
Article Summary: Dana white took a subtle dig at jake paul during a casual livestream. The ufc boss compared paul to boxing greats mike tyson and muhammad ali. Paul has been critical of the ufc and white's role in it. He has also questioned the direction of the sport and its direction.

Article Title: RR vs RCB, IPL Match Preview: Can Royal Challengers keep Sooryavanshi in check?
Article Text:
RCB skipper Rajat Patidar with Virat Kohli; and RR's Vaibhav Sooryavanshi

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

NUMBER GAMES

4 - Ten-wicket wins for RCB, the most in the IPL . Two of those have come against Rajasthan Royals, in Bengaluru in 2010 and at the Wankhede in 2021.

- Ten-wicket wins for RCB, the most in the . Two of those have come against Rajasthan Royals, in Bengaluru in 2010 and at the Wankhede in 2021. 113 - Virat Kohli’s unbeaten 113 off 72 balls in Jaipur on April 6, 2024 is the highest individual score in RR-RCB matches.

GUWAHATI: All discussions about Rajasthan Royals ’ highflying start to the season have centred on a certain 15-year-old phenomenon, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. The eve of Royals’ third and last home match this season here at their ‘second home ground’ was not different either, even with the in-form defending champions Royals Challengers Bengaluru (RCB), inspired by King Virat Kohli , coming to the city for the first time.Royals’ fast bowling coach Shane Bond was full of praise for the teen prodigy on Thursday. “He’s incredible. I have a 17-year-old son and when I compare him to Vaibhav, what he’s doing is remarkable,” Bond said. Highlighting his maturity level and developing game awareness, the former Kiwi pacer added, “It’s not just reckless hitting, he’s picking the right balls and showing growth. There’s a maturity in his batting. ”While the boy wonder has expectedly translated his flamboyance into match-defining knocks up front, his ‘senior’ opening partner Yashasvi Jaiswal has displayed his class with calm and composed knocks to hold the Orange Cap with 170 runs including two half-centuries to his name from three games.If the batting, led by the openers’ blistering innings, has given the home side solid platforms for victories, their bowlers have done their job to near perfection.However, on Friday, they will take on a side which is in a similar good form. Comfortably winning their first two games, defending champions RCB look to have started from where they left off last season.With batting and bowling units firing in unison, the Rajat Patidar-led side will aim to halt the Royals juggernaut before they move to their Jaipur home. Although all the top order batters have been firing for RCB, it’s Devdutt Padikkal who has held the spotlight scoring beautifully paced half-centuries in their last two games.—Stats: Rajesh Kumar
Article Summary: Virat kohli’s unbeaten 113 off 72 balls in jaipur on april 6, 2024 is the highest individual score in rr-rcb matches. Devdutt padikkal has held the spotlight scoring beautifully paced half-centuries in their last two games.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Points Table: LSG climb to 5th after win over KKR; Knight Riders slump near bottom
Article Text:
LSG vs KKR (BCCI Photo)

Watch Rashid Khan opens up on surgery, poor last season and bowling rhythm Rashid Khan opens up on surgery, poor last season and bowling rhythm

Here’s the updated IPL 2026 Points Table:

Position Team P W L NR Pts NRR 1 Rajasthan Royals 3 3 0 0 6 +2.403 2 Punjab Kings 3 2 0 1 5 +0.637 3 Royal Challengers Bengaluru 2 2 0 0 4 +2.501 4 Delhi Capitals 3 2 1 0 4 +0.811 5 Lucknow Super Giants 3 2 1 0 4 -0.359 6 Sunrisers Hyderabad 3 1 2 0 2 +0.275 7 Gujarat Titans 3 1 2 0 2 -0.270 8 Mumbai Indians 3 1 2 0 2 -0.715 9 Kolkata Knight Riders 4 0 3 1 1 -1.315 10 Chennai Super Kings 3 0 3 0 0 -2.517

NEW DELHI: Lucknow Super Giants moved up to fifth spot in the IPL 2026 Points Table after their win over the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) on Thursday. LSG now have 4 points, with two wins in three matches with an NRR of -0.359.KKR, meanwhile, continue to remain in ninth place with just one point from four games which came in the washout against Punjab Kings, and are still searching for their first win of the season.Unbeaten Rajasthan Royals remain at the top of the IPL 2026 Points Table with 3 wins in 3 matches accumulating 6 points with a NRR of 2.403, followed by Punjab Kings in second place with 5 points (2 wins in 3 matches, 1 N/R with NRR of 0.637). Royal Challengers Bengaluru are in third place with 4 points (2 wins in 2 matches with NRR of 2.501). Delhi Capitals are placed at number four with 4 points. They have two wins in three games.SRH are placed sixth with 2 points (1 win in 3 matches with NRR of 0.275), followed by Mumbai Indians at 8th spot with 2 points (1 win in 3 matches with NRR of -0.715) and KKR at 9th place with 1 point (0 wins, 1 N/R with NRR of -1.964). The last place, 10th, is occupied by CSK who are yet to open their account, enduring three defeats in as many games (NRR -2.517).Lucknow Super Giants edged past Kolkata Knight Riders by three wickets in a tight IPL 2026 clash at Eden Gardens, boosting their position in the points table. Chasing 182, LSG rode on strong knocks from Ayush Badoni and Mukul Choudhary to seal the win, while KKR’s winless run continued.Earlier, KKR posted 181/4 with contributions from Ajinkya Rahane, Angkrish Raghuvanshi, Cameron Green and Rovman Powell. However, their bowling couldn’t hold the total as LSG chased it down in the final over.
Article Summary: Unbeaten rajasthan royals remain at the top of the ipl 2026 points table. Punjab kings in second place with 5 points (2 wins in 3 matches, 1 n/r with nrr of 0.637) royal challengers bengaluru are in third place with 4 points. Delhi capitals are placed at number four with four points.

this week (6-12 April):

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 14 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With three wins in three matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Delhi Capitals, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, Lucknow Super Giants and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for Lucknow Super Giants in the last ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.

Chennai super kings and kolkata knight riders are two winless teams in ipl 2026.

Article Title: Stephen Curry: “It wasn’t my dad’s journey...”: Stephen Curry breaks silence on how his privileged background did not shape his NBA career
Article Text:
Stephen Curry breaks silence on how his privileged background did not shape his NBA career.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry opens up about how his family background did not help in his career



Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry , has proven to be a strong support to his career over the last decade



Stephen Curry, the Golden State Warriors’ star player, has been a force to be reckoned with on the field.While the NBA legend does come from a privileged household, Stephen Curry has opened up about how his background did not help in his career in the league.A few months ago, as Stephen Curry promoted his popular memoir, Shot Ready, he spoke to TODAY.com about his career.Stephen Curry said, "The blessing of being in a basketball family and having a dad who played in the NBA, yeah, I had access to a gym, I had equipment, I had all the opportunities in that respect, but it didn’t actually match up with my journey through the ranks…”The four time NBA champion added, "I was the last kid on my 9- and 10-year-old team, and I was the smallest kid on pretty much every team I played on until I got to college…”The Golden State Warriors’ star player continued, "I developed a work ethic through just understanding that I love to play the game, I had fun playing, and it was my journey, not my dad’s journey…”Over the last decade, Stephen Curry has turned out to be one of the most popular and talented athletes in the world.Away from the court, Stephen Curry also has a fulfilling life at home with his wife, Ayesha Curry, and their four young children.Though there have been a lot of criticisms about Stephen Curry’s marriage to his wife, Ayesha Curry, she has stayed by his side through everything that he has faced in his career.The two started dating when they were young adults and got married just a few years later, when they were 23 year olds.In the last few months, Stephen Curry’s marriage to his wife, Ayesha Curry, has been through a lot as the two have been brutally trolled for some of her controversial remarks on their marriage.To make matters worse, many fans have urged the NBA legend to “divorce” Ayesha Curry since they feel she does not “respect” their marriage.Amid all the mess, Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have maintained their distance from the drama.
Article Summary: Stephen curry breaks silence on how his privileged background did not shape his nba career. The four time nba champion said he was the last kid on his 9- and 10-year-old team. Stephen curry also has a fulfilling life at home with his wife, ayesha curry, and their four young children.

Article Title: Antonio Félix Da Costa: Two double-headers, one rare record: Antonio Felix da Costa’s unmatched Formula E feat
Article Text:
Antonio Felix da Costa (Image credit: Instagram)

Antonio Felix da Costa’s unmatched Formula E feat

Antonio Felix da Costa explains regenerative braking



Antonio Felix da Costa is currently riding high after securing back-to-back wins, first in Jeddah and then at the Madrid E-Prix. The Jaguar TCS Racing driver also has a rare feat to his name, that is, winning two full double-headers during his Formula E career. The Portuguese driver first achieved this feat in 2020 by winning both races at the Berlin double-header, and then repeated it in 2024. No Formula E driver has won two full double-headers, although several have managed to win one.Antonio Felix da Costa was racing for DS Techeetah when he claimed the Berlin double-header during the coronavirus-affected 2020 season. He went on to win the Formula E World Championship that year. He repeated the feat at the Portland double-header in 2024 while racing for Porsche.Formula E is currently on a month-long break following the Madrid E-Prix. The championship will return with the Berlin double-header scheduled for 1-3 May. It remains to be seen whether da Costa can secure a hat-trick with a third consecutive win or even claim another double-header. Alternatively, a new name could join the list of Berlin double-header winners.Antonio Felix da Costa is currently spending his break playing golf and pursuing other interests. The Jaguar TCS Racing driver recently featured in a video explaining the concept of regenerative braking in Formula E cars.Da Costa said in the video, “Hey guys, welcome to another At Track with Dak, and today, in 30 seconds, I’m going to talk to you about regen. So basically, here in Formula E, every time we press the brake pedal, we have 600 kilowatts of energy being regenerated back into the battery so that we can use that when we go on power and deploy it.”He added, “The interesting thing here, though, is that for every race we do, 30% of the energy we use isn’t in the battery to start with - it’s all regenerated as we drive during the race. That’s pretty cool, I think. See you in the next one.”Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Antonio felix da costa has won two full double-headers in his formula e career. The portuguese driver first achieved this feat in 2020 by winning both races at the berlin double-header, and then repeated it in 2024. The jaguar tcs racing driver recently featured in a video explaining the concept of regenerative braking in formula e cars.

Article Title: Miu Miu Campaign: “I won’t apologize, that’s their aesthetic”: Coco Gauff fires back at critics over Miu Miu campaign hair controversy
Article Text:
Coco Gauff fires back at critics over Miu Miu campaign hair controversy (Image via Getty)

Coco Gauff stands by her natural look amid criticism over her hair

American tennis star Coco Gauff has spoken out after facing criticism for her recent campaign for the Italian brand Miu Miu. The young player shared a video online to explain her side. What started as a proud moment for her in the fashion world quickly turned negative. Many people on social media began commenting on her appearance instead of appreciating her work.Most of the criticism was about her hair. Coco wore her natural hair in a simple bun. While some fans supported her look, others made rude and offensive comments. After staying quiet at first, she decided to respond. She used her TikTok account to talk about self-love and accepting natural beauty.Coco Gauff explained that everything in the photoshoot was her own choice. She said the shoot was done in a simple setup at her parents’ house. She also shared that she picked the outfit herself and liked the brand’s aesthetic. She made it clear that not everyone will understand the fashion, but she is happy with her choice.Talking about her hair, Gauff said she does not like making it too sleek because it can harm her hair.As a tennis player, she prefers to keep it natural and healthy. She said her 4C hair is a part of her identity and she will not change it to please others.She also spoke about why representation matters. Gauff said many girls have the same hair type and should feel proud of it. She added that if her natural hair can be part of a big fashion campaign, then others should feel confident too.The American icon also shared a positive message. She said people who criticize others are often dealing with their own insecurities. She encouraged everyone to ignore negativity and believe in themselves. She ended the 8 minute long video by saying that Black people and natural hair are beautiful and should always be celebrated. She took a strong stance against the discrimination.On the tennis side, Coco Gauff is doing well in the ongoing year. She reached the semifinals in Dubai and finished as runner-up in Miami. She now looks ready for the clay season and hopes to defend her French Open title.
Article Summary: American tennis star coco gauff has spoken out after facing criticism for her recent campaign for the italian brand miu miu. What started as a proud moment for her in the fashion world quickly turned negative. She used her tiktok account to talk about self-love and accepting natural beauty.

Article Title: Tommy Paul: Carlos Alcaraz offers surprising and playful deal to Tommy Paul just days after €10M yacht decision
Article Text:
Tommy Paul and Carlos Alcaraz (Image Via Getty)

Carlos Alcaraz and Tommy Paul share fun moment as yacht plans and clay season take center stage

Carlos Alcaraz is enjoying his time both on and off the court right now. The World No. 1 recently made headlines after reports confirmed he has ordered a luxury yacht worth around €10 million. Just days after that news came out, he made a lighthearted but interesting offer to American player Tommy Paul and fans loved it.The 22-year-old Spaniard, Carlos Alcaraz, shared that his custom yacht will take more than a year to be ready. While speaking to Tennis Channel, he explained how being out at sea helps him relax and step away from the pressure of tennis. That’s when he brought up Paul and joked about making a deal involving fishing trips.Carlos Alcaraz did not hide his excitement while talking about his new yacht project. Reports from Gazzetta dello Sport say the boat is a 27-meter Sunreef Ultima 88 catamaran, being built with Sunreef Yachts. It is expected to take around one to one-and-a-half years to complete.Speaking about it, Alcaraz said, “Mine, they’re gonna build it. It’s going to take one year, one year and a half. So I’m super excited about it… During the sea, everything is like chill.My thing is to disconnect from everything. So, I am super excited about it.”Then came the moment that caught attention. He added, “I saw Tommy Paul saying like… I better invite him. I will for sure. But I’ll tell him you’re gonna take me out for fishing. Half and half, I’m gonna make a deal with him.”While this fun exchange grabbed attention, both players are also doing well on court. Tommy Paul recently won the ATP Houston title, beating Roman Andres Burruchaga in the final. That gave him strong momentum at the start of the clay season.On the other side, Carlos Alcaraz is focused on defending his title at the Monte-Carlo Masters. He started his campaign with a win over Sebastian Baez and is now preparing for tougher matches ahead.At the same time, the race for World No. 1 is getting tighter. Jannik Sinner is closing the gap quickly. Still, Alcaraz made it clear that rankings are not his main focus right now.He said, “I’m going to lose No. 1 in the world at some point. I don’t know if it is going to be at this tournament or another one. I will just try to play my best and let’s see what happens, but for me the No. 1 spot is not in my mind right now.” For now, Alcaraz seems calm, focused, and enjoying the journey, whether it’s on clay courts or out at sea.
Article Summary: Carlos alcaraz and tommy paul share fun moment as yacht plans and clay season take center stage. The world no. 1 recently made headlines after reports confirmed he has ordered a luxury yacht worth around €10 million. Just days after that news came out, he made a lighthearted but interesting offer to american player tommy paul.

Article Title: Pepe Marti: Cupra Kiro’s Pepe Marti reveals preference for night and dry races in rapid-fire round
Article Text:
Pepe Marti (Image credit: Instagram)

Cupra Kiro driver Pepe Marti reveals race preferences in rapid-fire round

Where is Pepe Marti in Formula E Drivers’ Standings?



Cupra Kiro rookie Pepe Marti recently took part in a quick rapid-fire round, during which he shared the choices he would make on track in different situations. He expressed a preference for a night race over a day race and also revealed whether he would choose a wet or dry race. The 20-year-old Spanish driver has been performing well in his debut Formula E season and also recorded the fastest lap in Jeddah in February.Josep Pepe Marti played a “This or That” game with Reflo for fans on social media. When asked whether he prefers overtaking or defending, the Cupra Kiro driver confirmed his preference for overtaking. Asked if he would rather overtake on a straight or through a corner, he replied: “On a corner, definitely.”He also chose setting the fastest lap over maintaining consistent pace throughout the race. When asked whether he would prefer to lead from the start or come back through the field to win, he said: “I mean, you can’t do both, so I’m going to say come back from the back, coming through the pack.”When asked whether he would prefer a wet or dry track, he responded: “Depends on how rainy. I’ll go with a dry track.” He also said he would choose a night race every day over a day race if given the option.Nissan’s Instagram admin jokingly commented on the video while hinting at his Cupra Kiro car, “Can’t park there!!” Host Reflo responded: “Groundsman gave us permission… honest.” A fan, impressed with Martí’s English, also wrote: “Pepe making us Spaniards proud with a C3 in English.”Pepe Marti made his Formula E debut with Cupra Kiro this season. He is teammates with Dan Ticktum, and the pair are popular for featuring in fun social media content for fans.Marti has shown solid form after six races. He retired from his debut race in Sao Paulo but has delivered consistent performances since. After finishing seventh in Round 2 in Mexico, he placed ninth in Miami and 14th in Jeddah. However, he bounced back the following day to finish sixth in the second race of the Jeddah double-header, also setting the fastest lap.He added two more points in the most recent race in Madrid, finishing ninth at the Circuito del Jarama.The Spanish driver is currently 12th in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Cupra kiro driver pepe marti reveals race preferences in rapid-fire round. He expressed a preference for a night race over a day race and also revealed whether he would choose a wet or dry race. The 20-year-old spanish driver has been performing well in his debut formula e season.

Article Title: Lsu Tigers: NFL analyst wants Will Howard’s Pittsburgh Steelers to draft LSU QB amid no Aaron Rodgers call
Article Text:
NFL analyst wants Will Howard's Pittsburgh Steelers to draft LSU QB amid no Aaron Rodgers call (Image via Getty: Aaron Rodgers and Will Howard)

Steelers’ top 2026 NFL Draft prospect Garrett Nussmeier compared to Will Howard

Aaron Rodgers may help young quarterback with risk management

ESPN’s Ben Solak released a list of college football quarterbacks who would be deemed fit for NFL teams. One of them had LSU Tigers QB Garrett Nussmeier for the Pittsburgh Steelers at the third round, 99th overall pick of the 2026 NFL Draft.The 6-foot-2, 203-pounder received a Scouts Inc. ranking of QB3. He recorded 1,927 passing yards, 12 touchdowns [one rushing TD], and five interceptions with a 67.7 percent completion rate in the 2025 season.As for how he’s connected to Pittsburgh: Garrett’s father, Doug Nussmeier, and Steelers head coach Mike McCarthy know each other from their shared Dallas Cowboys days. When McCarthy was the head coach, Nussmeier was the quarterbacks coach. Plus, the 2026 draft prospect is a sharp QB who could quickly execute McCarthy’s “gun-heavy, drop back-heavy offense.”Coupled with familial connection, the Steelers need a “developmental QB2” with more mobility than 2025 sixth-rounder Will Howard. Garrett could fill that need. [The Ohio State national champion, Howard, was not mentioned beyond that point. Neither was Mason Rudolph. Howard may have to compete for QB2 role.]Anyhow, coming back to Nussmeier, it’s the ball security that is attractive about the 2026 draft prospect. He’s 6-foot-2 with 9 1/8-inch hands. He has had over 1,800 career snaps at LSU, but only seven fumbles.Apart from that trait, he is also a strong pocket navigator and has a crafty arm that can throw balls well in intermediate windows.The analyst further said that Nussmeier could learn a lot playing behind Aaron Rodgers , that is, if the veteran decides to return to Pittsburgh as their starting signal-caller this season.Nussmeier needs help in the risk management department, and Rodgers is a remarkable risk manager who reads the defense quickly, doesn’t hold the ball too long, and avoids dangerous throws that could result in fumbles or interceptions.If Rodgers shows any interest in developing a young QB behind him, Nussmeier could benefit from it. In 2025, the LSU product couldn’t give his best due to a core injury, but his 2024 film is nothing short of a Day 2 quarterback.If he goes up to the third round, it could be because of the core injury concerns. And if he ends up in Pittsburgh for 2026, he may have a year of recovery, as there would be no expectations for immediate results and no QB pressures on just one.He may play some only if Rodgers is scheduled to return. This looks like a valuable ‘redshirt scenario’ where Nussmeier recovers while Rodgers steps up for Pittsburgh. Only time will tell, however, if the ayahuasca-retreat lover wants to return…
Article Summary: Nfl analyst wants will howard's pittsburgh steelers to draft lsu qb garrett nussmeier amid no aaron rodgers call. The 6-foot-2, 203-pounder received a scouts inc. ranking of qb3. He recorded 1,927 passing yards, 12 touchdowns, and five interceptions with a 67.7 percent completion rate in the 2025 season.

Article Title: Mcdavid Five-Point Game: Connor McDavid powers Edmonton Oilers past San Jose Sharks with NHL five-point hat trick performance
Article Text:
Edmonton Oilers center Connor McDavid (97) celebrates with teammates after scoring a goal during the first period of an NHL hockey game against the San Jose Sharks, Wednesday, April 8, 2026, in San Jose, Calif. (AP Photo/Godofredo A. Vásquez)

Watch OILERS TODAY | Post-Game at SJS 04.08.26 OILERS TODAY | Post-Game at SJS 04.08.26

Connor McDavid leads Edmonton Oilers to NHL victory over San Jose Sharks



Connor McDavid has once again given reasons why he is regarded as among the best players in the NHL, as he delivered a masterclass in guiding the Edmonton Oilers to a 5-2 win over the San Jose Sharks. The Oilers went into the game with the aim of recovering from a rather dismal loss, and their captain made them do so in a very dramatic way.In the first few minutes, McDavid appeared as a very quick and decisive player who was able to control the speed and generate opportunities each time he received a puck. His speed in accelerating to defeat the defenders and space made it hard for San Jose to contain him during the match.McDavid started his account with a power-play goal in the first period, and was almost as quick to reply after Macklin Celebrini had put the Sharks on top. The captain of the Oilers then took the game by the throat in the second period, scoring two more goals to have a hat trick and put Edmonton squarely in charge.Along with his three objectives, McDavid also made two assists, setting up the goals of Vasily Podkolzin and Jack Roslovic in a very effective power-play performance.Edmonton took advantage of all three of their man-advantages, which was a big boost following their weakness in that regard lately.The Sharks made short-lived resistance with goals by Celebrini and Kiefer Sherwood, but could not match the pace of McDavid and his creativity. One of the young players who has made it to the league, Celebrini, admitted that it is difficult to play a player of the calibre of McDavid, more so when he is on a roll.The victory has big consequences for the Oilers, as they now become stronger in pursuing the lead in the Pacific Division. As the regular season nears its end, each point counts and wins such as this one showcase the potential of Edmonton as the playoffs approach.The night marked another milestone in an already impressive season for McDavid. His five-point outing further extends his lead in the scoring race and puts him within touching distance of another 50-goal campaign.
Article Summary: Connor mcdavid leads edmonton oilers to nhl victory over san jose sharks. Mcdavid scored a hat trick and made two assists in 5-2 win. The victory has big consequences for the oilers, as they become stronger in pursuing the lead in the pacific division.

Article Title: Xbox's Achievements update lets players hide games and show off completions
Article Text:
Xbox is enhancing player profiles with long-awaited updates. Gamers can now hide unwanted games from their public achievements list, a feature arriving later in April. Additionally, achievement notifications are receiving a visual refresh with custom colours and distinct icons for rare unlocks. Games with 100% completion will also be highlighted, signalling a commitment to community feedback.

Xbox is also giving achievement pop-ups a fresh coat of paint





Microsoft is rolling out a set of long-requested updates to Xbox Achievements, including the ability to hide games from your profile, a visual overhaul of unlock notifications, and a new way to showcase 100% completed titles. The changes are currently live for select Xbox Insiders and will roll out more broadly in the coming weeks. The hide feature itself arrives later in April.The headline addition is straightforward—you'll be able to remove any game from your public achievements list. It won't affect your Gamerscore total, but it does let you clean up a profile cluttered by dozens of Game Pass trials you played for 20 minutes and abandoned. This has been one of the most requested features from the Xbox Insider community for years.Achievement notifications are getting redesigned icons and animations, and they'll now match your custom Xbox colour. Rare achievements get their own distinct pop-up marked with a diamond icon, which is a nice touch for completionists who want that extra bit of recognition. Games where you've unlocked every achievement will also be highlighted in your list, with new filter options to surface them quickly.Xbox isn't fundamentally rethinking the achievement system it pioneered back in the 360 era, but these quality-of-life tweaks signal that new Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma is following through on her promise to address fan feedback. Sharma, who replaced Phil Spencer in February, said she's stood up a dedicated team focused on community requests—and called these changes just the beginning.
Article Summary: Xbox is enhancing player profiles with long-awaited updates. Gamers can now hide unwanted games from their public achievements list. Games with 100% completion will also be highlighted, signalling a commitment to community feedback. Xbox is also giving achievement pop-ups a fresh coat of paint.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.

Article Title: Mrbeast Streamer Drama: MrBeast streamer challenge drama escalates as RaKai targets streamer Mari in heated outburst
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

“50 Streamers Fight for $1,000,000”

“bad energy”

RaKai explodes on live stream after Mari calls him “bad energy”

“bad energy”

“Suck my d—k, you ugly b—h, f—k you!”







Streamer RaKai got very angry at Twitch streamer Mari after the April 2026 MrBeastevent. During the game, Mari called RaKaiand tried to push him out of the game. RaKai did not like this. He became very upset and later went live on his stream, shouting angry words at Mari. Fans were shocked and quickly shared clips of the moment online.Mari, a 22-year-old Twitch partner with over 272,000 followers, had left the event after losing a game of Connect 4. The fight made people all over social media talk about what happened. Clips spread fast on X, Instagram, and YouTube. Many viewers said the situation showed how strong emotions can get in competitive games.The argument started during the MrBeast challenge, where 50 streamers played games to win $1,000,000. Mari called RaKaiand tried to eliminate him from the competition. RaKai felt this was unfair. On April 7, he streamed live and shouted at Mari,He explained that he was just trying to play seriously and did not like the negative words.RaKai reached the later rounds but was eliminated by the winner, YourRAGE.After losing, he refused to leave quietly, and security had to step in.The clip of RaKai yelling went viral online. Fans and the streaming community, including Spanish-speaking viewers, reacted strongly. Some criticized RaKai for his harsh words, while others debated Mari’s role. The drama caused a lot of online discussion, some cancellations, and many memes. The incident also showed how competitions can sometimes make players very emotional.In the end, what was supposed to be a fun event became a viral fight. RaKai’s anger at Mari got more attention than the games themselves. Both streamers are still being talked about online, and fans keep debating what really happened. This shows how quickly small comments in competitions can turn into big arguments.
Article Summary: Twitch streamer rakai got very angry at twitch streamer mari after the april 2026 mrbeastevent. During the game, mari tried to push him out of the game. He became very upset and later went live on his stream, shouting angry words at mari. Fans were shocked and quickly shared clips of the moment online.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.
